tweets.text:
During his historic first year, @POTUS' bold leadership has bolstered economic growth, crushed inflation, and slashed burdensome regulations at lightning speed.

The Trump Administration is leading an American economic revival and paving the way for a new Golden Age for the American Worker 🇺🇸 
https://t.co/havGXdi4L8

card.name: summary_large_image
card.title: Under Trump, the American worker is winning
card.description: A year has passed, and the results are in: The Trump administration has been putting the American worker first since day one.

author.description: The 30th United States Secretary of Labor serving under the leadership of @POTUS Trump. American Workers First. 🇺🇸

tweets.text:
I started my America At Work tour last year to be on the ground learning directly from the hardworking men and women of our Nation. 

As part of the tour, I visited Sanford in Sioux Falls to get feedback on how policymakers can better support our rural hospitals and communities. 

It’s an honor to be able to bring their stories and insights back to DC!

author.description: The 30th United States Secretary of Labor serving under the leadership of @POTUS Trump. American Workers First. 🇺🇸

tweets.text:
Since 1862, Union Pacific has been an integral part of our nation’s supply chains and economy.

I was honored to tour their Omaha headquarters earlier this month, where I met with some of the men and women who keep one of America’s largest rail systems operating! https://t.co/LytkYNwe1I

author.description: The 30th United States Secretary of Labor serving under the leadership of @POTUS Trump. American Workers First. 🇺🇸

tweets.text:
I was proud to be in Syracuse, New York, today to participate in the groundbreaking for @MicronTech’s new chipmaking facility. 

The $100 BILLION investment is the largest private investment in New York history, and will create thousands of new American Jobs.

Under President Trump’s leadership, we’re going to continue seeing investments pour into our Nation as we unleash American Manufacturing Dominance! 

https://t.co/8vaF7FJ4i0

It was great to visit the site of Applied Digital’s new AI data center and see how President Trump’s agenda is delivering the jobs of the future. https://t.co/GrLH6P2o9j

tweets.text:

Under President Trump’s leadership, we’ll continue revitalizing American Industry and bring manufacturing back to our Nation 🇺🇸

author.description: The 30th United States Secretary of Labor serving under the leadership of @POTUS Trump. American Workers First. 🇺🇸

tweets.text:
After four years of economic disaster under Joe Biden, President Trump is delivering much-needed relief for hardworking Americans.

December’s CPI report confirms that inflation remains low and wages are rising for our workers. 

The best is yet to come 🇺🇸

tweets.text:
.@POTUS is the President of the American Worker, and the jobs numbers from the past year prove it. 

No modern President has done more to prioritize private sector growth while ensuring jobs go to AMERICAN-BORN Workers.

Thank you, President Trump 🇺🇸🇺🇸

author.description: The 30th United States Secretary of Labor serving under the leadership of @POTUS Trump. American Workers First. 🇺🇸

tweets.text:
President Trump has united a new coalition of working Americans like never before. 

From Union members to Industry leaders, the people of our nation have made it clear that they are tired of the globalist status quo that put our nation last.

Thats why, under @POTUS’ leadership, our only goal is to put our Nation and our People FIRST in every action we take.

President Trump’s America First trade agenda is delivering a new era of economic prosperity and industrial dominance for our workers.

author.description: The 30th United States Secretary of Labor serving under the leadership of @POTUS Trump. American Workers First. 🇺🇸

tweets.text:
This is HUGE! 

In 2025, the Department of Labor recovered more than $259 MILLION in back wages for nearly 177,000 employees nationwide.

This is the most back wages recovered since the first Trump administration in 2019.

We’ll keep fighting for our workers in 2026 🇺🇸 https://t.co/0VPgiPWDMK
